address: 5515 Riverdale Rd Suite C, College Park, GA 30349
brand_angle: A throne-worthy sanctuary where every guest ascends — luxury hair, skin, and self-care in Historic College Park.

services.title: Luxury Hair & Styling
services.desc: Cuts, color, locs, and protective styles delivered in a tranquil, healing-focused salon environment for all ages.

services.title: Waxing & Skin Care
services.desc: Brazilian and underarm waxing using vegan coconut-based hard wax, plus facial and skin treatments for a clean, confident glow.

services.title: Wellness & Self-Care Spa Services
services.desc: Restorative spa and self-care offerings designed around the salon's signature tranquil, ascension-minded atmosphere.

data_integrity: Honesty scrub 2026-05-31: the previously displayed '4.4 / 60 reviews' figure traced only to Trip.com, a travel-attractions scraper that biz records also showed serving a contradictory stale '1.8 / no reviews yet' artifact for this listing — i.e. an unreliable source. Purpose-built review platforms observed live show materially different, higher figures (Groupon 4.8 / 33 reviews; an aggregator listing ~35 reviews). No Google Business Profile rating could be independently confirmed. Because no single review count/rating is verifiable and reproducible, ALL specific star-rating and review-count assertions were removed from the live site (hero, proof stats, schema aggregateRating, meta, footer) and replaced with non-falsifiable positioning ('highly rated across Groupon, Yelp & Google'). Address and phone confirmed against the Trip.com and aggregator listings. No individual review quotes are fabricated or displayed. Services and brand positioning (tranquil, healing-focused, all-ages wellness; vegan coconut-based hard wax) reflect the business's own described offering.
